title: Australia Local Business Directory Scraper Input

keyword.title: Keyword / Niche
keyword.description: The type of business to search for (e.g., 'plumber', 'dentist', 'electrician').

location.title: Location (City or Suburb)
location.description: The location to search in. Format should be hyphenated for TrueLocal (e.g., 'sydney-nsw', 'melbourne-vic').

maxLeads.title: Maximum Leads
maxLeads.description: Maximum number of business leads to extract.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings to bypass Cloudflare. Apify Proxy (Residential or Datacenter) is highly recommended.
